title: iris pumila subsp. tristis
intro: Iris pumila subsp. tristis is a subspecies of the dwarf iris, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Iris pumila subsp. tristis include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. It can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and applications.
